archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Industrial Trade School

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-8, p-12 (use generous padding, min p-6 for bordered containers)
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-border (sharp edges or max rounded-sm for industrial feel)
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Hard shadows or pure flat 1px borders preferred over soft diffuse shadows to keep the 'industrial/built-to-last' feel. No glassy overlays for learning modules.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm, bold uppercase text for CTAs, using 'data-testid' attributes.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no soft shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and darker border.
components.navigation: Visible desktop navigation, solid background to ensure readability.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts using high-contrast, color-blind friendly palettes.

image_urls.description: High quality photograph of diverse electrical apprentices working on a residential panel board, bright workshop lighting, warm and dignified tone, professional trade school
Close up of hands wiring an electrical circuit board, copper wires, warm cinematic lighting, industrial trade focus
Minimalist modern certificate of completion, electrical trade school, warm bone white background, copper and deep blue typography, elegant seal
Technician carrying solar panel on rooftop. Clean energy installation outdoors.
A technician in safety gear installs a solar panel on a rooftop

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace generic SaaS styles with the provided industrial 'built-to-last' theme using the provided colors in tailwind.config.js.
Implement Cabinet Grotesk for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Update index.css to import these.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cards) have role-based data-testid attributes for E2E testing.
For the curriculum modules, present clear structural hierarchy. Include designated sections for scripture tie-ins, safety protocols, and video/image placeholders.
Apply 'Control Room' dense bento grid layouts for the Student, Instructor, and Admin dashboards.
Utilize the generated image assets for the landing page hero, lab module backgrounds, and certificate previews. Use `` tags mapped to the categories provided in media.image_urls.
Strictly avoid 'Inter' font and overly rounded, soft UI components. Aim for slight roundness (rounded-sm) and flat colors to reinforce the trade/industrial aesthetic.
Do not use generic placeholder services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided specific images from the media block.
